name: Codex Pyrimid Buyer-Agent Recommender
description: No-custody buyer-agent discovery page that imports the Pyrimid SDK and recommends x402 products from the live Pyrimid catalog.

safety.custody: No private keys, seed phrases, wallet credentials, or payment credentials are requested or stored.
safety.spending: The live page only discovers and recommends products. It does not sign transactions or make payments.
